name: Mia Khalifa
description: Mia Khalifa is a former adult film actress who gained prominence in the industry in a short period. Born on February 10, 1993, in Lebanon, she later moved to the United States. Mia entered the adult film industry in 2014 and quickly became one of the most searched-for performers. However, she only stayed in the industry for a few months, retiring in early 2015. Since then, she has been involved in various endeavors, including sports commentary and activism.
creator: Uzzu
